name: WhatFont
description: Identify any font on a webpage by hovering your mouse over the text. Shows font family, size, weight, line height, and color instantly.

name: ColorZilla
description: Advanced eyedropper and color picker. Pick any color from any page element, get HEX/RGB/HSL values, and access a color history palette.

name: CSS Peeper
description: Extract CSS and build style guides from any website. Inspect element styles, fonts, and assets without opening DevTools. Built for designers.

name: Fonts Ninja
description: Identify, test, and bookmark fonts from any website. Shows exact font name, foundry, and lets you try the font on any selected text instantly.

name: VisBug
description: Open-source browser design tool. Edit any website visually — move, resize, restyle, or inspect elements on any live page without code.

name: Page Ruler Redux
description: Draw rulers and guides on any webpage to measure the pixel distance between elements. Essential for pixel-perfect design work.

name: Stylebot
description: Change the appearance of any website instantly. Create custom CSS rules, hide elements, and save your styles for any site you visit.

name: Responsive Viewer
description: Test any website across multiple screen sizes simultaneously in a single view. Show multiple viewports at once for responsive design testing.

name: Hoverify
description: All-in-one developer and design inspection tool. Inspect elements, pick colors, view fonts, check responsive breakpoints, and capture screenshots.

name: Eye Dropper
description: Pick colors from any pixel on your screen — not just web pages. A precise color picker that works across your entire display.

name: Fonts & Colors
description: Inspect and display font name, size, weight, color, and line height for any text by simply hovering over it. Designed specifically for designers.

name: UI Inspector
description: Hover over any element to see its full CSS properties — font, padding, margin, border, color, and box model — in a floating tooltip overlay.

name: Grid Ruler
description: Create guide lines and grids on any webpage. Set custom column grids, baselines, and alignment guides for pixel-perfect layout inspection.

name: PerfectPixel
description: Overlay a semi-transparent design mock-up on top of your web page to compare pixel-by-pixel. Essential for front-end developers implementing designs.

name: Muzli 2
description: Design inspiration on every new tab. Aggregates content from Dribbble, Behance, Product Hunt, and design blogs. A daily dose for designers.

name: Dimensions
description: Measure the dimensions of any element on a webpage by hovering over it. No DevTools needed — just hover and see width, height, and position.

name: Colorblinding
description: Simulate different types of color blindness on any webpage. Eight simulation modes to help designers build more accessible, inclusive interfaces.

name: Page Layers
description: Inspect any webpage as a layered PSD-like structure. See all elements as layers you can show, hide, and inspect — like Photoshop but for live websites.

name: CSSViewer
description: A simple CSS property viewer. Hover over any element and a floating panel shows all its CSS properties instantly without opening DevTools.

name: Tota11y
description: Accessibility visualisation toolkit. Annotates your page with accessibility issues — heading structure, contrast ratios, alt text problems, and more.

name: Intention
description: Replaces your new tab with a mindful intention screen. Forces you to state what you want to accomplish before browsing, reducing mindless surfing.

name: Strict Workflow
description: A no-nonsense Pomodoro timer that blocks distracting sites during work intervals. No whitelisting, no exceptions — strict by design.

name: Tab Snooze
description: Snooze browser tabs to reopen them at exactly the right time. Perfect for emails, tasks, and articles you need later but not right now.

name: Nudge
description: Adds a mindful moment when you visit distracting websites. Shows how long you have spent and gently asks if this visit is intentional.

name: Session Buddy
description: Manage, save and restore browser sessions. Recover lost tabs, organise them into named sessions, and open entire workspaces with a click.

name: Workona Tab Manager
description: Organise browser tabs into project-based workspaces. Keep research, client work, and personal browsing completely separate and searchable.

name: Video Speed Controller
description: Control playback speed of any HTML5 video with keyboard shortcuts. Speed up lectures, rewind precisely, and set custom speed increments.

name: Clockify Time Tracker
description: Free time tracking directly in your browser. Track time on any project, generate reports, and integrate with tools like Trello, Asana and GitHub.

name: Forest
description: Stay focused by growing a virtual tree when you avoid distracting websites. Kill the tree by leaving and lose your progress. Gamified focus.

name: OneTab
description: Convert all open tabs into a list with one click. Reduces memory usage by up to 95% and lets you restore tabs individually or all at once.

name: Momentum
description: Replace new tab with a personal dashboard showing a daily photo, your focus for the day, weather, and a to-do list. Beautiful and motivating.

name: StayFocusd
description: Limit the amount of time you spend on time-wasting websites. Highly configurable — set daily time limits per site and block them when exceeded.

name: Tabby Cat
description: Replace your new tab with a randomly generated, friendly cat. Each cat has a unique name and personality. A delightful little break from work.

name: JSON Viewer Pro
description: The best JSON formatter and viewer for developers. Renders raw JSON beautifully with collapsible nodes, search, and a graph view for nested data.

name: Wappalyzer
description: Identify the technologies used on any website — frameworks, CMS, e-commerce platforms, analytics tools, and more. Tech stack fingerprinting.

name: Requestly
description: Intercept and modify HTTP requests and responses. Redirect URLs, inject headers, mock API responses, and test network changes without a proxy.

name: Web Developer
description: Adds a toolbar with dozens of web developer tools — disable CSS/JS, view page info, outline elements, manipulate cookies, and much more.

name: Lighthouse
description: Official Google tool for improving web page quality. Run audits for performance, accessibility, SEO, and best practices on any URL.

name: React Developer Tools
description: Official debugging tool for React apps. Inspect component trees, props, state, and hooks directly in DevTools with a dedicated React panel.

name: Redux DevTools
description: Debug Redux state changes in your app. Time-travel debugging, action history, state diff viewer, and import/export of state snapshots.

name: Postman Interceptor
description: Capture and sync browser requests directly to Postman. Test APIs by intercepting live browser traffic without writing code.

name: Octotree
description: GitHub code tree panel. Adds a sidebar to GitHub showing the full repository file tree — navigate large codebases without cloning.

name: Gitpod
description: Open any GitHub repository in a full VS Code environment in the cloud with one click. No local setup required.

name: daily.dev
description: Developer news aggregator on every new tab. Curates the best dev articles, tutorials, and discussions from across the web.

name: VisBug
description: Open-source browser design tool. Edit any website visually — move, resize, restyle, or inspect elements on any live page without writing code.

name: LanguageTool
description: Grammar, style, and spell checker supporting over 25 languages. Catches subtle errors Grammarly misses, and works offline with no sign-up.

name: Wordtune
description: Rewrites and paraphrases any sentence directly in your browser. Offers multiple tone options — formal, casual, short, or expanded — with one click.

name: Read Aloud
description: Text-to-speech extension that reads any webpage aloud. Supports 40+ languages, adjustable speed, and highlights each word as it is spoken.

name: Hemingway Editor Web
description: Highlights complex sentences, passive voice, and adverbs directly on any text field. Encourages bold, clear, concise writing in real time.

name: Writer
description: AI-powered writing assistant focused on workplace writing. Checks tone, clarity, inclusivity, and style guide compliance across any text field.

name: Compose AI
description: AI-powered autocomplete and writing tool. Generates email replies, expands bullet points into paragraphs, and autocompletes sentences as you type.

name: Readable
description: Analyses the readability of any web page or text. Shows Flesch-Kincaid grade level, reading time, and word frequency to help simplify your writing.

name: uBlock Origin
description: The most efficient ad and tracker blocker available. Uses far less memory than alternatives and blocks ads, tracking scripts, and malware domains.

name: Privacy Badger
description: EFF's tracker blocker that learns which domains are tracking you across sites and automatically blocks them. No filter lists needed — self-learning.

name: Bitwarden
description: Open-source password manager with end-to-end encryption. Store unlimited passwords free, auto-fill credentials, and generate strong passwords.

name: ClearURLs
description: Removes tracking parameters from URLs before you click them. Cleaner links and better privacy without any configuration required.

name: HTTPS Everywhere
description: Automatically switches thousands of websites from insecure HTTP to secure HTTPS. Protects your browsing from eavesdropping and tampering.

name: Temp Mail
description: Get a disposable temporary email address directly in your browser. Use it to sign up for services without exposing your real email address.

name: NordVPN
description: Fast and secure VPN directly in your browser. Encrypt your connection, hide your IP, and access geo-restricted content with one click.

name: Cookie AutoDelete
description: Automatically deletes cookies from closed tabs. Keep only the cookies you need, delete the rest — prevents cross-site tracking automatically.

name: Decentraleyes
description: Protects against tracking through free CDNs by serving common libraries locally. Works alongside your regular ad blocker for better privacy.

name: Hypothesis Web Annotator
description: Annotate any webpage or PDF with highlights and notes. Share annotations publicly or privately. Essential for academic research and deep reading.

name: Zotero Connector
description: Save research sources directly to your Zotero library with one click. Detects articles, books, and webpages and captures full metadata automatically.

name: Readwise Highlighter
description: Highlight anything on the web and save it to Readwise for spaced-repetition review. Transforms passive reading into retained knowledge.

name: Mercury Reader
description: Removes ads and clutter from any article, giving you a clean, customisable reading view. Adjust font, size, and theme for distraction-free reading.

name: Print Friendly & PDF
description: Remove clutter, ads, and navigation from any webpage before printing or saving as PDF. Preview and edit the final output before printing.

name: Textmarker
description: Highlight and save text from any webpage in multiple colors. Your highlights persist across browser sessions and can be exported as notes.

name: Liner
description: Highlight important text on any webpage and save it for later. Creates a personalised library of highlights across all sites you visit.

name: Instapaper
description: Save any article to read later in a beautiful, distraction-free format. Syncs across all your devices including Kindle.

name: Google Scholar Button
description: Look up academic papers directly from your browser. One-click access to citations, full text, and related articles on Google Scholar.

name: Dark Reader
description: Enables dark mode on every website. Analyses and inverts site colors intelligently, with brightness, contrast and sepia controls per site.

name: Helperbird
description: Accessibility and reading support with dyslexia fonts, text-to-speech, magnifier, focus mode, and over 30 tools for reading and writing support.

name: Zoom Page WE
description: Zoom in on individual pages independently without affecting the global browser zoom. Save per-domain zoom levels that are remembered for each site.

name: OpenDyslexic
description: Override all fonts on web pages with the OpenDyslexic font. Designed to improve readability for people with dyslexia.

name: High Contrast
description: Apply high contrast filters to any webpage. Choose from several filters to make web content easier to read for users with visual impairments.

name: Image Alt Text Viewer
description: Shows alt text for all images on a webpage. Helps developers and accessibility auditors quickly check image accessibility compliance.

name: Camelizer
description: Track Amazon price history with a graph. See the true price of any Amazon product over time and get alerted when it drops to your target price.

name: Honey
description: Automatically finds and applies coupon codes at checkout. Supports thousands of stores and shows price history on Amazon products.

name: Keepa
description: Amazon price tracker that shows price history charts directly on Amazon product pages. Never overpay by seeing the lowest historical price.

name: PriceSpy
description: Compare prices across hundreds of online shops for any product. Find the cheapest retailer before buying anything online.

name: Coupert
description: Automatically finds and tests all available coupon codes when you checkout. Shows cashback offers and best deals from partner stores.

name: Google Meet Enhancement Suite
description: Enhances Google Meet with push-to-talk, auto mute on join, picture-in-picture, and keyboard shortcuts. Makes remote meetings less painful.

name: Zoom Scheduler
description: Schedule Zoom meetings directly from Google Calendar. One-click meeting creation with automatic Zoom link insertion in calendar invites.

name: Loom
description: Record your screen, camera, and microphone simultaneously. Share a link instantly — no downloading, no uploading. The fastest way to send a video.

name: Toby
description: Better tab management through visual collections. Save tabs as named collections, organise by project, and restore entire sessions with one click.

name: Mailtrack
description: Email read receipts for Gmail. See when your emails are opened, how many times, and from which device — with a simple double-tick indicator.

name: Grammarly
description: AI-powered writing assistant that checks grammar, spelling, punctuation, and style across every website you use. Works in Gmail, Docs, and more.

name: ProWritingAid
description: Deep writing analysis beyond grammar. Checks for repetition, vague words, sentence structure, pacing, and readability across 20+ writing reports.

name: Calmly Writer
description: Minimalist distraction-free writing environment. Hides all browser UI and gives you a clean white canvas to write without interruptions.

name: Google Dictionary
description: Double-click any word on any webpage to see its definition in a popup. Supports pronunciation, examples, and multiple languages.

name: Rememberry
description: Translate and memorise words while browsing. Hover to translate, then save words to a spaced-repetition vocabulary deck for later review.

name: Scribe
description: Automatically creates step-by-step guides as you work. Records your clicks and keystrokes and generates illustrated SOPs and tutorials instantly.

name: Magical
description: Text expander and autofill tool. Create shortcuts that expand into full paragraphs, auto-fill repetitive forms, and transfer data between tabs.

name: Screencastify
description: Screen recorder built for Chrome. Record tab, window, or full desktop with webcam overlay. Edit and share directly from the browser.

name: Evernote Web Clipper
description: Clip articles, screenshots, PDFs, and web pages directly to Evernote. Annotate before saving and organise into notebooks automatically.

name: Notion Web Clipper
description: Save any webpage to Notion with one click. Clipping preserves the full article text and lets you choose which Notion database to save it to.

name: Raindrop.io
description: Visual bookmarking tool. Save links with previews, organise into collections, add tags and notes, and search your entire bookmark library instantly.

name: WikiWand
description: Beautiful Wikipedia reader. Transforms Wikipedia's default layout into a clean, modern, magazine-style reading experience.

name: Office Editing for Docs
description: Edit Microsoft Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files directly in Chrome without installing Office. Converts and opens Office files seamlessly.

name: Google Translate
description: Translate full pages or selected text with one click. Supports 100+ languages and shows translations inline without leaving the page.

name: Marinara Pomodoro Assistant
description: Flexible Pomodoro timer with customisable work and break intervals. Shows notifications and tracks your daily productivity statistics.

name: Manic Time Tracker
description: Automatic time tracker that records which websites and apps you use throughout the day. Generates detailed reports of where your time goes.

name: LINER for YouTube
description: Highlight and save key moments from YouTube videos. Creates timestamped notes on videos and builds a searchable library of video highlights.

name: TubeBuddy
description: YouTube channel management and SEO tool. Keyword research, tag suggestions, A/B thumbnail testing, and bulk processing for creators.

name: SimilarWeb
description: See traffic stats for any website instantly. Monthly visits, traffic sources, top pages, audience geography, and competitor comparison.

name: Keywords Everywhere
description: SEO keyword research tool that shows search volume, CPC, and competition data on Google, YouTube, Amazon, and other platforms.

name: Viewport Resizer
description: Test web pages across different device sizes directly in the browser. Dozens of presets for phones, tablets, and laptops — no DevTools needed.

name: Check My Links
description: Scans any webpage for broken links. Highlights valid links in green and broken ones in red — essential for SEO audits and QA testing.

name: ColorPick Eyedropper
description: Advanced color picker that shows hex values as you hover over any pixel. Includes a zoom-in magnifier for pixel-precise color selection.

name: BrowserStack
description: Test your website on real devices and browsers directly from Chrome. Access thousands of device/browser combinations without owning the hardware.

name: Full Page Screen Capture
description: Capture a full-page screenshot of any website with one click. Saves the entire scrollable page as a PNG or PDF — not just the visible viewport.

name: Fireshot
description: Capture, annotate, and share screenshots. Supports scrolling capture, region select, and one-click saving to PDF, PNG, or clipboard.

name: GoFullPage
description: Simple full-page screenshot tool. One click captures the entire page and lets you download as PNG or PDF. No permissions, no sign-up.

name: Panda 5
description: Design and development news feed on every new tab. Curates content from Product Hunt, Designer News, GitHub Trending, and Dribbble.

name: Tab Resize
description: Split your screen between multiple browser tabs. Arrange tabs in grid layouts — 2 columns, 3 columns, or custom splits for multitasking.

name: Vimium
description: Navigate the web using only keyboard shortcuts — no mouse needed. Vim-style key bindings for links, scrolling, tab management, and history.

name: AutoplayStopper
description: Stops videos from automatically playing on every website. Prevents autoplay on YouTube, Facebook, Twitter, and news sites.

name: Picture-in-Picture Extension
description: Watch videos in a floating mini player while working on other tabs. Works on YouTube, Netflix, Twitch, and any HTML5 video.

name: Social Blade
description: See YouTube, Twitch, and Instagram stats for any creator. Follower counts, growth rates, estimated earnings, and historical analytics.

name: Adblock Plus
description: Block ads and tracking on all websites. Acceptable Ads program allows non-intrusive ads by default — configurable to block everything.
